parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Kodi/XBMC destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise kodis:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Kodi JSON-RPC GUI.ShowNotification request and post it to your Kodi device (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Kodi JSON-RPC endpoint (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Kodi destinations, direct

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Kodi/XBMC host
